expected_behavior: Agent dispatches to the Create workflow based on the explicit '/nerdbot create' invocation
Agent loads references/kb-architecture.md first before proposing or scaffolding structure
Agent establishes the layered KB pattern with .obsidian/, raw/, wiki/, schema/, config/, indexes/, and activity/
Agent seeds starter indexes, shared vault surfaces, and the activity log as part of the initial KB setup
Agent records scope, non-goals, and an initial ingest queue before writing synthesized wiki content
